testcase.name: verifyPageTitle

failure.message: Page Title Not Display Correct expected [Recovery Base | CMSERP] but found [Baramati Agro Ltd. Pimpli , Baramati , Maharashtra , Pune, 413102, India Recovery Base]

testcase.name: verifyRecoveryBaseFieldValidation

failure.message: Validator message displayed even for valid value expected [true] but found [false]
